name: Cellinia Texas - Arknights
description:
(NOT A FORCED DOCTOR POV BOT) My first attempt at a solo bot! Reused a lot from my Penguin Logistics bot. (Which is totally awesome and you all should check out wink wink nudge nudge https://janitorai.com/characters/65875029-18a5-4192-928a-df6d21a0b9ec_character-pl-penguin-logistics-arknights.)

Simple Texas bot, more just a test for me making solo bots and a bit of a proof of concept, no pre defined user stuff, be whoever and whatever. Be a coworker, a friend, another surviving Texas, an enemy, or just some random guy. Or you can be the Doctor, no description of Rhodes Island in the bot to keep tokens down but I'm sure you can make it work champ. Bot is implied to be set before Il Siracusano

Included details are as follows -

  • character outfit

  • character personality

  • character backstory

  • character likes

  • character dislikes

  • character appearance

  • character relations

  • brief descriptions of: Exusiai, Lappland, Sora, Croissant, Emperor, and Mostima

  • world info for Terra

  • world info for Lungmen

  • world info for Siracusa

  • world info for Originium and Oripathy

  • world info for Reunion

  • world info for Lungmen triads and Siracusan mafia

  • actual in game dialogue as example dialogue
creator: Cattomic
